description: A panoramic photograph captures the coastal village of Portofino, Italy, nestled around a natural harbour under a cloudy sky. The foreground shows the dark blue waters of the harbour filled with numerous boats, including small motorboats, yachts, and several large sailing yachts with tall white masts. The village is characterised by densely packed, multi-storey buildings painted in various pastel colours such as yellow, red, orange, and white, lining the crescent-shaped waterfront. On the far left, a church with a prominent bell tower stands near the water. The village is surrounded by steep, verdant hillsides covered in dense Mediterranean forest and scattered with additional residential buildings, some quite large, featuring white or light-coloured facades. A promenade and dock areas with people walking are visible along the waterfront. The sea extends into the distance on the left, meeting a cloudy horizon.
